stories.headline: Russian drone strike damages site near Chornobyl nuclear plant
stories.description: Ukraine’s President Volodymyr Zelenskyy condemns ‘extremely vile’ attack that did not lead to spike in radiation.

stories.headline: Zelensky set for London talks as he criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike
stories.description: Ukrainian officials say a Russian drone hit a storage facility for spent nuclear fuel near the Chornobyl nuclear plant.

stories.headline: World Cup 2026 in numbers: Key statistical goals, titles and age records
stories.description: The 2026 World Cup has already set records for the most host nations, most matches and the highest prize money.

stories.headline: A bluffer's guide to the World Cup
stories.description: Not a football superfan? Try these easy conversation-starters to sound like an expert.

stories.headline: Giant crowds greet Pope Leo at public mass in Madrid, Spain
stories.description: The pontiff praises Madrid as a beacon of inclusion as about 1.2 million people gather for Sunday mass.
